# WIMACAddress.Hash.Method

**Enumeration**

The method used to hash the MAC Address

## Declaration

```swift
enum Method
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **WIMACAddress.Hash.Method.sha256**: Hash using `SHA256(salt, macAddress)`.
